bead.title: openrouter: gate candidate on credential presence before network I/O
bead.description:
PROBLEM
When the openrouter API key env var / config is empty, unset, or malformed (wrong prefix / wrong length), Fizeau still surfaces openrouter candidates as `eligible: true` in routing_decision. Auto-route then selects openrouter and the dispatch fails at HTTP-call time with `401 Missing Authentication header`. Operators see a transport error instead of the actual root cause (no key).

ROOT CAUSE
`service_routing.go` candidate-enumeration path (the same module that already plumbs `health_freshness_at` / `quota_freshness_at` for LMStudio aliveness) has no provider-health hook for openrouter. The candidate row is constructed unconditionally from the configured model list with no inspection of the credential the provider will need to authenticate.
Exact line range to be confirmed during implementation by grepping for the LMStudio `endpoint_unreachable` filter_reason emission — the credential hook plugs in alongside it.

PROPOSED FIX
Add a synchronous, network-free credential-presence check that runs on every routing pass for openrouter candidates:
- Look up the openrouter API key from env var and config (mirroring however the openai-compatible provider currently loads it).
- If empty/unset → mark candidate `eligible: false`, `filter_reason: "credential_missing"`.
- If present but obviously malformed (wrong prefix `sk-or-...`, length outside expected range) → same `credential_missing` (distinct from `credential_invalid`, which is reserved for server-side rejection in [[openrouter-credit-balance-probe-and-cache]]).
- Populate the candidate evidence body so operators can see WHICH key location was checked.
- Do NOT issue any HTTP call in this path; this hook must be O(1) and side-effect free.

NON-SCOPE
- Credit balance probing (covered by [[openrouter-credit-balance-probe-and-cache]]).
- 401 / transport-error distinction (covered by [[openrouter-probe-failure-modes-and-surfacing]]).
- Multi-account credential rotation / failover within openrouter (parent non-scope, preserved).
- Per-model credit-cost forecasting (parent non-scope, preserved).
- DDx-side changes — DDx passes `policy=default` through unchanged per CONTRACT-003 (parent non-scope, preserved).

CROSS-REF
Filed in tandem with fizeau-80d4bf41 (auto-route candidate enumeration). Sibling beads: [[openrouter-credit-balance-probe-and-cache]], [[openrouter-probe-failure-modes-and-surfacing]].
bead.acceptance:
1. With openrouter API key unset (env var empty AND config absent), routing_decision shows openrouter candidates as `eligible: false` with `filter_reason: "credential_missing"` and zero HTTP calls are made to openrouter.ai. Verified by `TestOpenrouterCredentialMissingNoNetwork` in `service_routing_test.go` which scrubs the env var, installs a panicking HTTP roundtripper for the openrouter host, runs an Execute with no model pin, and asserts the candidates payload + zero roundtripper invocations.
2. With a malformed key (wrong prefix or implausible length), candidate is `eligible: false` with `filter_reason: "credential_missing"`. Verified by `TestOpenrouterMalformedKeyTreatedAsMissing`.
3. With a syntactically valid key present, the credential hook does not exclude the candidate (allowing downstream credit/health checks to decide). Verified by `TestOpenrouterValidKeyPassesCredentialGate`.
4. Existing happy-path routing tests remain green — no regression in `service_adr005_test.go` or `service_routing_test.go`.
5. `cd /Users/erik/Projects/fizeau && go test ./...` green.
6. `cd /Users/erik/Projects/fizeau && lefthook run pre-commit` green.
